remarks: Welcome to this beautifully remodeled Cape located in the desirable In-Town location, where timeless charm meets exceptional craftsmanship. This turnkey home offers 4 bedrooms, 2 full bathrooms, and a thoughtfully designed open-concept floor plan that seamlessly blends comfort and style. The stunning designer kitchen is the heart of the home, featuring quartz countertops, a large center island, high-end appliances, and abundant cabinetry, all flowing effortlessly into the inviting living room centered around a striking fireplace finished in Tumble Natural Travertine Tuscany tile. Just off the kitchen, the spacious dining room offers custom built-in cabinetry with a wine chiller, creating the perfect space for entertaining or everyday gatherings. A custom mudroom adds convenience, while two bedrooms and a beautifully renovated full bathroom complete the main level. Upstairs you'll find a spacious primary bedroom, an additional bedroom, and a second full bathroom, offering a flexible layout for family or guests. Step outside to enjoy the new stone patio overlooking the level backyard, ideal for relaxing or entertaining, along with a one-car garage and beautifully refreshed landscaping. Extensively renovated from top to bottom with quality finishes throughout, this exceptional home is just moments from shopping, restaurants, schools, parks, the train, and major commuting routes. This is one you won't want to miss.
